title: FullStory Session
description: A session in FullStory representing a recorded user interaction. Sessions contain events, page views, and behavioral data that can be replayed. Session replay URLs are scoped to the FullStory account and require authenticated access.

url.description: URL to view the session replay in the FullStory application. Only accessible by browsers logged into the appropriate FullStory account.

created.description: Timestamp when the session was recorded

SessionEvent.description: An individual event captured during a session, such as a page view, click, or custom event

timestamp.description: Timestamp when the event occurred during the session

SessionSummary.description: AI-generated summary of a session using a configured prompt profile

summary.description: The generated summary text or structured response based on the configured response schema

configProfileId.description: The summary prompt profile ID used for generation

SummaryConfigProfile.description: Configuration profile for AI session summaries defining prompting instructions and context

id.description: Unique identifier for the summary config profile

pre_prompt.description: Instructional text included before the session data for primary instructions and persona setting

post_prompt.description: Instructional text included after the session data

response_schema.description: JSON Schema defining the structured output format. Recommended for programmatic use of summary data.

slice.description: Configuration to trim session data sent to the AI

mode.description: Which events to include: FIRST (earliest), LAST (latest), or TIMESTAMP (specific range)
